title: hedera pastuchovii subsp. cypria
intro: Hedera pastuchovii subsp. cypria, also known as the Cyprus ivy or Cypriot ivy, is a subspecies of the Hedera pastuchovii plant, a type of evergreen climber native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedera pastuchovii subsp. cypria include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Hedera pastuchovii subsp. cypria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of infusions and decoctions.
